title: Ex-UK political aide Steve Hilton would overhaul California as governor, he tells BBC
summary_full: The Trump-backed candidate is running as a Republican in the deeply liberal state on a platform that he says isn't beholden to party ideology.
summary_public: The Trump-backed candidate is running as a Republican in the deeply liberal state on a platform that he says isn't beholden to party ideology.
